text:
Created attachment 185096
patch against head

Hi,

This updates to version 4.0.0, release notes:

https://suricata-ids.org/2017/07/27/suricata-4-0-released/

Minor changes in the port to repair the SC option, getting rid of bsd.port.pre.mk in the process.

Tested with the help of multiple users in OPNsense:

https://forum.opnsense.org/index.php?topic=5595.0

Poudriere build log attached.


Cheers,
Franco
